Title: Clipboard Flow Timeline (OTel)
Description: View all clipboard pipeline stages for one OTel trace in chronological order. Group by TraceId to see each clipboard operation as a separate timeline. Phase 87+: queries by SpanName prefix (OTel standard semantics).

Example.Description: Find all spans for a specific trace by TraceId

ExampleDescriptions: Find all stages of a single clipboard operation by grouping on TraceId
View the complete timeline from capture (clipboard.flow root) through all child stage spans
Identify bottlenecks by seeing time gaps between stage spans
Cross-device traces share the same TraceId via W3C traceparent — both sender and receiver spans appear here
_note: Property name casing for OTLP-ingested data in Seq 2025.2: use 'TraceId' and 'SpanName' (PascalCase) as shown by Seq's own trace UI. If queries return no results, try '@TraceId' or 'trace_id' as Seq may differ by version. A live Seq instance is the final gate for confirming exact property names.
